EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} assigned the role "{object.new_value}" to the account {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed the role of the account {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} changed the role of the account {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
A user changed the role of an account to "{object.new_value}" on host {event_src.host}
